summary: Completed backend testing of Flipkart invoice extraction bug fix. All 15 tests passed. The extraction logic correctly handles all 3 document types: Tax Invoice (FKRKA), Credit Note (FKCKA), and Commercial Credit Note (ICNDL).
passed_tests: Job exists and completed with status=completed
All 4 test files processed successfully (0 failures)
flipkart1.pdf Credit Note (FKCKA26000190312) extraction - document type, invoice number, GSTIN, amounts verified
flipkart2.pdf Tax Invoice (FKRKA26000290632) extraction - document type, invoice number, GSTIN, amounts, 4 line items verified
flipkart3.pdf Commercial Credit Note (ICNDL26000031306) extraction - no GSTIN, no tax, amount=428.4 verified
flipkart4.pdf Commercial Credit Note (ICNDL prefix) extraction - no GSTIN, no tax, amount=14.4 verified
CSV export /api/invoice/export/csv/{job_id} returns valid .csv with invoice data
Invoice API root endpoint /api/invoice/ returns ready status
Export correctly returns 404 for non-existent job
All extracted amounts are valid numbers
SAC codes format validation (6 digits starting with 99): 998599, 996812, 998365
GSTIN format validation (15 characters): Provider=29AACCF0683K1ZD, Receiver=07AGCPY2367E1Z9
Extraction method recorded as flipkart_regex for audit trail
End-to-end test: New job upload + extraction with use_llm=false works correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing job 4cff7aa3-2d11-46f0-af7d-77fa2b985901 with 4 pre-processed Flipkart test PDFs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Flipkart invoice extraction is fully working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_flipkart_invoice_extraction.py can be reused for regression testing. The extract_flipkart_invoice() function in /app/backend/invoice_extractor.py correctly handles 3 document types with regex extraction.
